mapper.insert:
insert into stock_limit_up_record ( trade_date, secu_code, secu_name, change_rate, last_px, cmc, time, up_num, up_reason, plate_secu_code, plate_secu_name, plate_change_rate, plate_up_reason, plate_stock_up_num, up_tags, create_by, create_time, remark ) values
(#{item.tradeDate}, #{item.secuCode}, #{item.secuName}, #{item.changeRate}, #{item.lastPx}, #{item.cmc}, #{item.time}, #{item.upNum}, #{item.upReason}, #{item.plateSecuCode}, #{item.plateSecuName}, #{item.plateChangeRate}, #{item.plateUpReason}, #{item.plateStockUpNum}, #{item.upTags}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate(), #{item.remark})
on duplicate key update secu_name = values(secu_name), change_rate = values(change_rate), last_px = values(last_px), cmc = values(cmc), time = values(time), up_num = values(up_num), up_reason = values(up_reason), plate_secu_code = values(plate_secu_code), plate_secu_name = values(plate_secu_name), plate_change_rate = values(plate_change_rate), plate_up_reason = values(plate_up_reason), plate_stock_up_num = values(plate_stock_up_num), up_tags = values(up_tags), update_by = 'system', update_time = sysdate()
